ns0:entry.ns0:title: AikidoSec/safe-chain
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AikidoSec/safe-chain
Language: javascript
Protect against malicious code installed via npm, yarn, pnpm, npx, and pnpx with Aikido Safe Chain. Free to use, no tokens required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ToolJet/ToolJet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet
Language: javascript
ToolJet is the open-source foundation of ToolJet AI - the AI-native platform for building internal tools, dashboard, business applications, workflows and AI agents 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TryGhost/Ghost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost
Language: javascript
Independent technology for modern publishing, memberships, subscriptions and newsletters.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WebGoat/WebGoat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WebGoat/WebGoat
Language: javascript
WebGoat is a deliberately insecure application

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/claude-relay-service
Language: javascript
CRS-自建Claude Code镜像，一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、OpenAI、Gemini、Droid 订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Remote MCP Server that securely connects Jira and Confluence with your LLM, IDE, or agent platform of choice.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/blackmatrix7/ios_rule_script
Language: javascript
分流规则、重写写规则及脚本。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/awesome-copilot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot
Language: javascript
Community-contributed instructions, prompts, and configurations to help you make the most of GitHub Copilot.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gsd-build/get-shit-done
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done
Language: javascript
A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code and OpenCode.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hmjz100/LinkSwift
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hmjz100/LinkSwift
Language: javascript
一个基于 JavaScript 的网盘文件下载地址获取工具。基于【网盘直链下载助手】修改 ，支持 百度网盘 / 阿里云盘 / 中国移动云盘 / 天翼云盘 / 迅雷云盘 / 夸克网盘 / UC网盘 / 123云盘 八大网盘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jgraph/drawio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jgraph/drawio
Language: javascript
draw.io is a JavaScript, client-side editor for general diagramming.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: liyupi/ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liyupi/ai-guide
Language: javascript
程序员鱼皮的 AI 资源大全 + Vibe Coding 零基础教程，分享大模型选择指南（DeepSeek / GPT / Gemini / Claude）、最新 AI 资讯、Prompt 提示词大全、AI 知识百科（RAG / MCP / A2A）、AI 编程教程、AI 工具用法（Cursor / Claude Code / OpenClaw / TRAE / Lovable / Agent Skills）、AI 开发框架教程（Spring AI / LangChain）、AI 产品变现指南，帮你快速掌握 AI 技术，走在时代前沿。本项目为开源文档版本，已升级为鱼皮 AI 导航网站

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nasa-gibs/worldview
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nasa-gibs/worldview
Language: javascript
Interactive interface for browsing global, full-resolution satellite imagery

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qeeqbox/social-analyzer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qeeqbox/social-analyzer
Language: javascript
API, CLI, and Web App for analyzing and finding a person's profile in 1000 social media \ websites

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
